raw_source.title: [Remote] Looking For Blockchain Devs in SoftGalaxy
raw_source.body:
About
Soft Galaxy ( https://www.softgalaxy.ro/ ) is world-leader in software development and digital solutions provider. The company was founded by a team of renown technology experts and is recognized as a leader in full lifecycle application development; architecture, analysis and design services; UI/UX design; project management; debugging and performance tuning; database design and development, mission critical architecture; enterprise application development; and developer training.

Requirements
3 years of experience at web3 and blockchain
Expertise in full stack development
Enough acknowledges on databases
Nice to Haves
Rich experience on smart contracts
Familiar with cryptocurrencies, especially mining or trading
UX redesigning skills
Team leadership skills
Job Nature
Full-time or not: This is full-time job and you'd be glad to join our team
Remote or not: Remote Roles are open to you
Salary and Benefits
Junior Software Engineer: $70,000 - $90,000 / year
Software Engineer: $90,000 - $130,000 / year
Senior Software Engineer: $130,000 - $180,000 / year
Full Stack Developer: $95,000 - $145,000 / year
DevOps Engineer: $110,000 - $160,000 / year
Cloud Engineer: $120,000 - $170,000 / year
AI/ML Engineer: $130,000 - $190,000 / year
Web3/Blockchain Engineer: $150,000 - $200,000 / year
Work Location
Office Address
22 Tudor Vladimirescu Blvd
Green Gate Building, 8th Floor
Bucharest, Romania
Contact
Gmail: [contact.software.galaxy@gmail.com](mailto:contact.software.galaxy@gmail.com)
Telegram: @Andrew87612
Or leave your gmail so that we can invite you to our slack channel.
I am looking forward to hearing from you.
raw_source.author: contactsoftwaregalaxy-del
